raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/, I opened an XXXX XXXX XXXX in store. I never received a physical card and realized it was stolen when I received a bill in the mail. From XX/XX/2025 to XX/XX/, the card was used to make over {$2000.00} in purchases. The thief also requested a new card and added the card to their phone " wallet ''. I cancelled the card, closed the account, and expressed to Barclay 's Bank that no one with my social security # should be permitted to open any future account with them. 

Since XXXX, the company has found some of the purchases to be legitimate ( over {$300.00} ). They continue to charge me a late fee and purchase charge every month. Since XXXX, I have called the company multiple times, expressing that I did not make any of those purchases and that I had already expressed they were all fraudulent since the first time I called them. Every person who I have spoken to does not document appropriately - evidenced by my having to explain the situation each time because the employee on the phone does not see anything in the notes. 

The pattern of the purchases remains the same ( XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX, XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX ). They provided no reason for how they determined that some of the purchases were legitimate. 

At this time, the bill continues to grow and my credit score is being heavily impacted. The bank has provided no reasoning or solution to this problem. 

on XX/XX/, they expressed that my mailing address was changed. I have never changed the mailing address. This company continues to allow illegitimate persons to make changes on this closed account.
